scope: Spec at .omc/specs/deep-dive-matflow-ultimate-test-suite.md. Catalogue-driven Ralph loop combining Playwright (e2e), Vitest (unit + integration), and agent code review. ~80 catalogue items covering booking races, admin/owner privilege manipulation, contradictory cross-table data, tenant isolation, and the documented error patterns from defensive-engineering-reference + matflow-common-errors. This conversation runs the foundational stories (US-001 through US-005); subsequent Ralph invocations work the catalogue.

stories.title: Ralph artefacts: reviewer prompt + learnings log
acceptanceCriteria: File .omc/ralph/reviewer-prompt.md exists with the 6 hard-fail-check reviewer prompt verbatim from the spec
File .omc/ralph/learnings.md exists
Both files committed to the repo so future Ralph invocations can resume
stories.notes: Done before Ralph was invoked. Both files written 2026-05-10 14:21.

stories.title: Validate reviewer via 3 planted-bug probes
acceptanceCriteria: Probe 1 (tenant-scope-bypass via where: {}) triggered reviewer FAIL on check 4
Probe 2 (expectation tuning to mask refund bug) triggered reviewer FAIL on check 2
Probe 3 (tautological expect(1).toBe(1)) triggered reviewer FAIL on check 1
Probe results documented in .omc/ralph/learnings.md under 'Pre-flight (probes — 2026-05-10)'
stories.notes: All 3 caught with bonus catches on additional checks (defence-in-depth working).

stories.title: Build seeded error catalogue (.omc/ralph/error-catalogue.json)
acceptanceCriteria: File .omc/ralph/error-catalogue.json exists
Catalogue has at least 60 items seeded from Lane 2 master table at .omc/specs/deep-dive-trace-matflow-ultimate-test-suite.md (the 60-row error→test mapping)

Each item has fields: id (e.g. ULT-001), suspected_failure, route_or_module, severity (CRITICAL|HIGH|MEDIUM|LOW), evidence_hint, test_type (vitest-unit|vitest-integration|playwright-e2e|agent-review), explicit_assertion, status: 'open'
Items ordered: CRITICAL first, then HIGH, then MEDIUM, then LOW (within severity, original Lane 2 order preserved)
Items include the 5 kiosk-token threat surface gaps (ULT-KIOSK-001..005) from Lane 1's critical unknown
Items include explicit booking-race, admin-manipulation, contradictory-data items per the user's stated priorities (Lane 2 drill-down sections)
JSON is valid (parseable)

stories.title: Phase E: parameterised cross-tenant authorisation suite (the highest-leverage single test)
acceptanceCriteria: File tests/integration/cross-tenant-authorisation-matrix.test.ts exists

Test drives off the canonical list of tenant-scoped Prisma models (at minimum: Member, Class, ClassInstance, AttendanceRecord, MembershipTier, Payment, ClassPack, MemberClassPack, RankSystem, MemberRank, RankHistory, SignedWaiver, Order, Notification, Announcement, AuditLog)
For each model, runs three assertions: cross-tenant GET → 404; cross-tenant PATCH → 404 + row unchanged; cross-tenant DELETE → 404 + row still exists
Test uses the existing tests/integration/rls-foundation.test.ts seed/teardown infra (two-tenant fixture)

Test runs successfully via 'npx vitest run tests/integration/cross-tenant-authorisation-matrix.test.ts' (whether all assertions PASS or some FAIL — both outcomes are valuable; FAILs surface real bugs)
Any cross-tenant assertion that FAILs is documented as a new catalogue item in .omc/ralph/error-catalogue.json with severity CRITICAL

stories.title: Handoff: progress.txt updated for next-iteration resume
acceptanceCriteria: progress.txt has a section 'Ralph Ultimate Test Suite — current state'
Section lists: stories complete (US-001..004), stories pending (US-006+), how to resume (re-invoke /ralph .omc/specs/deep-dive-matflow-ultimate-test-suite.md)
Section includes the catalogue file path and how many open items remain
Section includes the cost estimate for the remaining loop work (~$32 Sonnet for one full pass)
Section names the cheapest highest-value next iteration (top open CRITICAL item from the catalogue)

stories.title: Iteration N+: per-catalogue-item Ralph loop until stop predicate satisfied
acceptanceCriteria: Each open catalogue item processed in priority-then-FIFO order
For each: a test added that exercises the suspected_failure (per the test_type assigned)
Reviewer PASS verdict before marking catalogue item closed
Stop predicate: catalogue zero open items + last 5 reviewer verdicts PASS + ≥60% line coverage on app/api/ and lib/
Safety halt at 100 iterations if stop predicate not reached
stories.notes: Out of scope for THIS conversation. Scheduled for subsequent Ralph invocations. The PRD lists this story so the contract is explicit.
